title: حرف الحاء والخاء والجيم
instruction_ar: ارسم ولوّن الحرف / أكتب الحرف / أكمل الحرف الناقص في كل مرة / أحوط حرف الجيم / صل الحرف بالكلمة المناسبة
instruction_en: Draw and color the letter / Write the letter / Complete the missing letter each time / Circle the letter / Connect the letter to the correct word

items.activity: traceLetter / color picture (camel) and trace the letter ج
writeLetter — trace dotted ج rows; reference picture of camel
completeWord / fillBlank — write missing ج (عَ..ـين)
completeWord / fillBlank — write missing ج (..ـوْزٌ)
completeWord / fillBlank — write missing ج (دَ..ـا)
circleLetter — circle the letter ج (حوط) among a cloud of letters
colorPicture / listen-and-color — color the pictures whose names start with/contain ج (e.g. bell, rabbit, carrot)
identifyPosition — letter-position card: choose where ج sits in نجمة (star)
identifyPosition — letter-position card: choose where ج sits in مسجد (mosque)
identifyPosition — letter-position card: choose where ج sits in جمل (camel)
writeLetter — هيا نكتب حرف ج: trace forms (isolated/initial/medial/final ج جـ ـجـ ـج) then write on lined boxes
traceLetter / color picture and trace the letter ح (reference image is a sheep)
writeLetter — trace dotted ح rows; reference picture of a whale
completeWord / fillBlank — write missing ح (مِلـ..)
completeWord / fillBlank — write missing ح (..ـافلة, school bus)
completeWord / fillBlank — write missing ح (لـ..ـم, meat)
circleLetter — circle the letter ح (أحوط حرف الحاء) among a cloud of letters
colorPicture / listen-and-color — color pictures containing ح (e.g. ant, horse/pony, candy)
connectWord — connect the letter form to the matching word (chick holding بحر)
connectWord — connect the letter form to the matching word (chick holding حمامة)
connectWord — connect the letter form to the matching word (chick holding بلح)
underlineWord — underline words containing ح (حليب among options)
underlineWord — underline words containing ح (مفتاح among options)
underlineWord — underline words containing ح (تفاح among options); distractors: بطيخ، لحم، جزر
identifyPosition — letter-position card: choose where ح sits in لحم (meat)
identifyPosition — letter-position card: choose where ح sits in ضحك (laughing)
identifyPosition — letter-position card: choose where ح sits in فرح (joy/girl)
writeLetter — هيا نكتب حرف ح: trace forms (isolated/initial/medial/final ح حـ ـحـ ـح) then write on lined boxes
traceLetter / color picture (sheep) and trace the letter خ
writeLetter — trace dotted خ rows; reference picture of a sheep
completeWord / fillBlank — write missing خ (دُ..ـان, smoke)
completeWord / fillBlank — write missing خ (صَارُو.., rocket)
completeWord / fillBlank — write missing letter (..ـرِيفٌ); reference image looks like fire/launch — word unclear, low confidence
circleLetter — circle the letter خ (أحوط حرف الخاء) among a cloud of letters
colorPicture / listen-and-color — color pictures containing خ (e.g. bread/loaf, clock, olives)
connectWord — صل الخبز لسلة الحرف (خ): connect the bread to the basket labeled خ (distractor basket س)
colorPicture — لون خيمة الحرف (خ): color the tents marked خ (distractors أ، س)
identifyPosition — letter-position card: choose where خ sits in خرج (bird leaving cage)
identifyPosition — letter-position card: choose where خ sits in صخرة (rock)
identifyPosition — letter-position card: choose where خ sits in كوخ (hut)
colorLetter — لون حرف الخاء: color خ in a circle-maze among other letters

notes: Multi-letter packet covering ح، خ، ج (rendered title order Haa/Khaa/Jeem). 18 images mix three sub-packets. Forms shown for each letter: isolated, initial (جـ/حـ/خـ), medial (ـجـ/ـحـ/ـخـ), final (ـج/ـح/ـخ) on the 'هيا نكتب' and 'أكتب' pages. m001 is a generic dot-tracing picture sheet (تتبع النقط ولون الصورة) shared across packets — not letter-specific. m002/m010/m018 are 'لون حرف ...' circle-maze coloring pages. Cloud circle-letter pages contain many distractor letters not transcribed individually. LOW-CONFIDENCE: m013 third fill-blank word read as رغيف but the picture (fire/launch) and partial text (..ـرِيفٌ) do not clearly match — Arabic vowel marks faint; flagged. No .wdp/.wmf files present (all PNG). No full sentences in this packet — only single words and letter forms.
